persona.name: Holly Bennett
persona.occupation: People operations manager at a fast-growing remote startup
persona.background: Inherited the account with no handoff. Onboarding for new hires keeps stalling and she's worried her boss will blame her for low adoption. The team just hired a wave of new people and she's trying to get everyone set up before a company offsite.

user_goals: Find out why her team's new hires keep getting stuck partway through onboarding
Confirm whether the account has enough open seats for the new people she's hiring
Get a training session booked for the new hires sometime next week before the offsite
Leave a note for the CS team flagging that her predecessor left and she needs more support
See which of her existing teammates haven't logged in recently so she can nudge them

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Look up a customer account by company name, contact name, email, or account ID and return its core CRM record. Call this FIRST to resolve the canonical account_id before any tool that reads detail on or mutates the account.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Company name, contact name, email, or account ID to search for

parameters.name: include_contacts
parameters.description: Include the list of contacts on the account

tools.name: get_onboarding_status
tools.description: Check onboarding completion rates and stuck points for an account's users.

tools.name: get_subscription_details
tools.description: Get current subscription plan details and available upgrades. Read-only — to actually change a plan use change_subscription_tier.

tools.name: get_user_list
tools.description: List all users under a customer account with their status and last activity.

tools.name: schedule_meeting
tools.description: Schedule a meeting between the customer and their CS team.

tools.name: create_internal_note
tools.description: Add an internal note to the customer's account for the CS team. Internal only — the customer never sees this. Use this to record context, risk flags, or follow-ups. Do NOT use it to communicate with the customer (use send_customer_email) or to record a conversation that already happened (use log_customer_interaction).

initial_message: Hi! Sorry, this is probably a mess. I took over our account a little while ago and we just hired a bunch of people, and onboarding keeps getting stuck for them somehow. Can you help me figure out what's going on before our offsite?

expected_state_changes.goal: Get a training session booked for the new hires sometime next week before the offsite
Leave a note for the CS team flagging that her predecessor left and she needs more support
